title: Mirror Mage
description: chaotic 2-player online spell-casting duel. Pick up elemental spells and launch them at your opponent in a frantic battle of timing and luck. Spells bounce wildly off walls and platforms, and your aim wobbles unpredictably when you jump, making every shot a gamble. Deflect incoming projectiles with your orbiting mirror shield before it breaks.

title: Spy Master
description: Top-down adventure game with exploration, combat, and NPC interaction. Features A* pathfinding, Goal-Oriented Action Planning (GOAP) AI, inventory system, and Tiled level editor integration.

title: Master Blaster
description: Side-scrolling platformer with physics-based movement, a particle weapon system, destructible tilemaps, and finite state machine AI enemies.

title: The Yellow Submarine
description: Infinite scroller where you pilot a submarine dodging mines and collecting air bubbles to survive. Features custom WebGL shader effects, object pooling, and a seed-based game recording and replay system.

title: Wizard's Last Stand
description: Tower defense survival game where you play as a wizard casting spells against endless waves of zombies. Place spell towers to defend your base, survive infinite rounds across 2 levels â one single-floor, one two-floor.

title: WolfieCart
description: Kart racing game built in Unreal Engine. Race against 3 AI opponents across 3 laps to win. Windows platform.
